name: Sour Cream Chocolate Chip Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar together in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add the flour and baking soda to the mixture on low speed, alternating with adding sour cream until combined.
4. Fold in the chocolate chips and walnuts (if using).
5. Pour the batter into an ungreased tube pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour to 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool briefly in the pan on a wire rack before removing it.
This recipe yields a simple yet delicious pound cake that can be easily customized by adjusting ingredient quantities. It is perfect served warm with butter or toasted slices with ice cream. For best results, consider freezing one portion for later use; the frozen cake will remain dense when thawed.
